Images where gemini differs from humans by more than 1 point

Human reference: harvey, robin, seb. 24 images total  ·  kitchen: 6 · bathroom: 4 · bedroom: 6 · living_room: 8. Red = gemini scored higher than humans, amber = lower. Sorted by gap size within each room.

kitchen — 6 images >1 off (scale 1–7)

human mean3.00
gemini4.80
gemini range4.8–4.8
gap (gem−human)+1.80 (high)
gemini reasoning (5 replicates)
  1. rep 1 · 4.8 The kitchen features high-quality traditional dark wood cabinetry with crown molding and a matching custom range hood. It includes granite countertops, a tiled backsplash, and a small matching island with seating. While the style is somewhat dated and the layout is compact, the permanent materials and built-in appliances elevate it above a standard mid-range renovation.

The sophisticated, cohesive designer finishes and custom architectural integration elevate it to an upscale level.
